title: AI for Africa Bootcamp 2026
description: A polished static site for the AI for Africa Bootcamp 2026, a residential program in Johannesburg run by African Leadership Academy and MBZUAI.

hero.title: AI for sustainability and agriculture in Africa, shaped to grow the next generation of leaders.
hero.summary: The bootcamp connects responsible AI with sustainability and agriculture challenges in Africa so participants learn to build practical solutions and lead with impact.
hero.image_alt: Illustration of AI supporting sustainable agriculture
